game_info.title: Color Roller 3D
game_info.concept:
Roll to the ball which has the same color!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/color-road/id1342468799

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Roll to the ball which has the same color!
Avoid the ball which has different color.
Good luck!
game_info.description:
Welcome to **Color Roller 3D**!

You control a rolling ball speeding down an infinite cosmic track.
**The Golden Rule:** You can only touch other balls that match your current color.
Touching a ball of a different color will shatter your roller and end the game.
Pass over **Color Ramps** to switch your color and adapt to the path ahead.
Survive as long as you can to achieve the highest score!
game_info.controls:
*   **Arrow Left / A**: Strafe Left
*   **Arrow Right / D**: Strafe Right
*   **Enter**: Start Game
*   **Esc**: Pause / Resume
*   **R**: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic player movement and track boundary constraints.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The automated controller will repeatedly strafe left and right to the extreme edges of the track.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should move smoothly between lanes but stop at the track edges without falling off or getting stuck.
TEST_1.description: Verify basic player movement and track boundary constraints.
TEST_1.strategy: The automated controller will repeatedly strafe left and right to the extreme edges of the track.
TEST_1.expected: The player should move smoothly between lanes but stop at the track edges without falling off or getting stuck.

TEST_2.test_description: Validate collision logic with matching color orbs.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The controller will steer the player towards orbs that match the player's current color.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should pass through the matching orbs, collect score, and continue without dying.
TEST_2.description: Validate collision logic with matching color orbs.
TEST_2.strategy: The controller will steer the player towards orbs that match the player's current color.
TEST_2.expected: The player should pass through the matching orbs, collect score, and continue without dying.

TEST_3.test_description: Validate collision logic with mismatched color orbs.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The controller will intentionally steer the player into an orb of a different color.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The game should immediately transition to the GAME_OVER_LOSE state upon impact.
TEST_3.description: Validate collision logic with mismatched color orbs.
TEST_3.strategy: The controller will intentionally steer the player into an orb of a different color.
TEST_3.expected: The game should immediately transition to the GAME_OVER_LOSE state upon impact.

TEST_4.strategy_description: The controller will aim for Color Ramps to change the player's color.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Upon passing through a ramp, the player's mesh color should update to match the ramp's color.

TEST_5.test_description: Stress test object pooling and memory management.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Run the game at 5x speed for 60 seconds using the perfect AI bot.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Frame rate should remain stable (near 60 FPS), and no visual glitches should occur as objects recycle.
